remarks: Set on a desirable 1-acre lot in a quiet neighborhood setting on the west side of town, this property offers exceptional potential to renovate, expand or reimagine the existing home to fit your lifestyle. Ideally located with easy access to town, the Merritt Parkway, shopping, dining, and top-rated schools, the property combines convenience, privacy, and enduring neighborhood appeal. A rare opportunity to create your dream home in one of New Canaan's most desirable locations. Please do not walk property without confirmed appointment.
